---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="banner">
  <div class="banner-text">
    <h1>Grace Lush</h1>
    <p>Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management</p>
    <p>Remote Sensing | GIS | Environmental Analysis</p>
  </div>
</div>

## Welcome

Welcome to my MGEM e-portfolio. This website showcases my academic work, GIS projects, and capstone research completed during the Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management program.

Through this portfolio, you will find:

- Information about my background and interests
- My professional resume
- Key course deliverables and projects
- Details about my MGEM capstone research

My work focuses on applying **GIS, spatial analysis, and remote sensing** to better understand environmental change and support data-driven decision making.

Thank you for visiting my portfolio.
